Week 6 | Summary

Week 6 | Overview

Revisions and Editing
As we approach the end of this course, we enter the final phase of the writing process. This includes revising, editing, and polishing your compare-and-contrast essay. Now is the time to refine your work, ensuring that your arguments are compelling, flow smoothly, and that your writing is polished to perfection. But it's not just about perfecting this one essay. It's also about reflecting on our journey together throughout this course. We will revisit our insightful discussions in the past weeks. Reviewing previous discussions includes revisiting the valuable concepts and techniques we've learned. The reflection allows us to appreciate the progress we've made and consider how we can continue applying these skills beyond the boundaries of this course.
